message:
feat: startup update checker + manual Check for Updates in settings

- On app launch, checks GitHub Releases API after 3s delay
- Shows MaterialBanner with UPDATE/LATER if newer version exists
- Settings → About shows 'Check for Updates' with download dialog
- Version display now uses AppUpdateService.currentVersion (v0.3.0)
- Bumped version to 0.3.0+3

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 name: clubtivi
 description: "Open-source cross-platform IPTV player with intelligent EPG mapping, multi-provider stream failover, and remote control support."
 publish_to: 'none'
-version: 0.2.0+2
+version: 0.3.0+3
 
 environment:
   sdk: ^3.11.0
